name: Color Force II 12 Plus
comment:
Color Force II 12 Plus is designed for a variety of applications where powerful and precise lighting is essential, including cyc, flood and wall washing up to 12m.

The Color Force II Plus boasts enhanced brightness and a richer palette, while maintaining the same form factor and character as the market-leading original. The innovative optical system with individually controlled pixels provides smooth, beautiful and even coverage for any cyc or surface with no unsightly colour shadowing.
